title: About Deutsch Heimkehr
subtitle: Practical German for Everyday Life
intro: Deutsch Heimkehr was created for learners who want more than vocabulary lists and grammar exercises. The goal is to help learners communicate with confidence in the situations they may encounter while living, working, studying, or traveling in Germany.

sections.heading: Our Mission
sections.body: Deutsch Heimkehr teaches German for everyday life in Germany. The course follows CEFR progression, but the focus remains practical communication: speaking with neighbors, shopping for food, making appointments, understanding official situations, and building confidence step by step.

sections.heading: Why Deutsch Heimkehr?
sections.body: Many German courses are designed around passing CEFR exams. Those exams are valuable and provide an internationally recognized framework for measuring progress, but they are not the ultimate goal for every learner. Deutsch Heimkehr uses the CEFR levels as a roadmap while keeping everyday communication as the destination.

sections.heading: Keep Deutsch Heimkehr Free
sections.body: Deutsch Heimkehr is offered free of charge because language learning should be accessible. Optional support helps fund new lessons, app improvements, hosting, maintenance, and future learning resources. Your support helps keep Deutsch Heimkehr free for everyone.

footer: Built with ❤️ to help people build a life in Germany.
